title: A Dynamic Duo for Yield in 2022
text: COVID-19, inflation and the Federal Reserve have so dominated the financial news that it was easy to miss the run-up in utility and real estate shares. In the fourth quarter of 2021, real estate investment trusts (REITs) averaged a 17.5% return and utilities averaged 12.9%.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Host Hotels (HST) Stock Now
text: Host Hotels (HST) is well poised to benefit from the recovery in leisure demand, though core business transient might be a spoilsport amid constrained business transient demand and a delayed return to offices.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings Call to be Held on February 17, 2022
text: BETHESDA, Md., Jan. 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”) will report fourth quarter 2021 financial results on Wednesday, February 16, 2022, after the market close.
